nodes.name: speckit.git.commit.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for the auto-commit hook that stages and commits all changes when invoked around a Spec Kit lifecycle event, using per-event enable flags and messages from git-config.yml.

nodes.name: speckit.git.feature.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for feature branch creation, detailing sequential vs timestamp numbering resolution, short-name generation heuristics, script invocation, and the GIT_BRANCH_NAME environment variable override.

nodes.name: speckit.git.initialize.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for Git repository initialization, covering script invocation, fallback commands, customization hooks, and graceful degradation when Git is unavailable.

nodes.name: speckit.git.remote.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for detecting the Git remote URL and extracting GitHub owner and repository name for issue-creation integration, with graceful degradation when no remote is configured.

nodes.name: speckit.git.validate.md
nodes.summary: Command specification for validating the current branch against sequential (NNN-) and timestamp (YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-) naming patterns and confirming the corresponding spec directory exists under specs/.
